title: 20:48 â December 11, 2020
body_text:
20:48 â December 11, 2020
CEBA Documentation Updates
The Government of Canada is enhancing support for small businesses by offering $20,000 in additional financing for existing CEBA recipients and increasing the limit to $60,000 for new applicants. The loans are interest free with forgivable amounts up to 33%, as applicable, if repaid by December 31, 2022.
We updated the Central 1 Facilitated CEBA Application Procedures â Quick Reference Guide, Form 9140, and the CEBA Settlement and Reconciliation Part in the Payment Solutions Manual as described in the tables below.
